subcodes.title: Words to Wilson, Engelhorn, Stewart, Brittingham, spoken on 1909-10-23
subcodes.first_line: At this table you will not find material comfort, but you will find spiritual comfort... I praise this fact that women have made progress. They are, in America, to surpass the men.
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @role and station of women, @equality of men and women, @unity; oneness of humanity
